title: Time tracking under My Work
excerpt: It would be very useful to have the ability to do time tracking of tasks within the My Work space. People forget they have the time tracking going for a task and then start tracking a new task. Doing it in the Work space…

posts.author: PaolaM (PM)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very useful to have the ability to do time tracking of tasks within the My Work space. People forget they have the time tracking going for a task and then start tracking a new task. Doing it in the Work space would mean you can see all your tasks and whether you are already tracking time on any of them.
